chief_complaint: An 85-year-old man presents with features of severe thyrotoxicosis.
history: The patient had no prior history of thyroid disease. He was found to have severe thyrotoxicosis caused by painless subacute thyroiditis.
exam: No specific physical examination findings are provided.
labs: The patient had no uptake of (99m)TcO(4) and was negative for thyroid-stimulating hormone receptor antibodies.
